days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? push day was not logged again this week. That's four consecutive weeks without a push day log. No data, no progress. We still need 10/10/10 at RPE ? 7 before you earn 135. This is the workout that keeps getting skipped and it is the one holding the whole push day block in place. Full range of motion, touch the chest, controlled descent, drive through the heels. Log this session.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 ? four weeks without a push day log means this has been sitting untouched since the bump. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full ROM, elbows at 45 degrees off the torso. Aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8. Log it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? last confirmed data was 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/8, two sets clean and set 3 was one point too high. Need all three sets at RPE ? 7 to earn 35. Brace the core, press straight up, full lockout at the top. Don't lean back into the reps ? that's a shoulder injury waiting to happen.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 12 ? no push day data in four weeks. Bumped to 12 after clean work at 10 and we still haven't seen it in the log. Need 12/12/12 to earn the next jump. Slight bend in elbows, lead with the elbows not the wrists, 2-second hold at the top, slow the negative. Log it.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN ? replacing close-grip bench press this week. Same triceps and chest stimulus but a different movement pattern to keep things fresh. Lean slightly forward to load the chest, elbows flared a little, lower until your upper arms are parallel to the floor, then drive back up. No weight added ? bodyweight only. Aim for 8-10 clean reps at RPE 7-8. If these feel easy, note it and we can add a dumbbell between the knees next time. Log each set.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN ? replacing dumbbell overhead tricep extension this week. Hits the lateral head of the tricep as a complement to the overhead work we ran last cycle. Rope attachment on the cable, elbows pinned to your sides, split the rope at the bottom for full extension, control the return. Start at 40 lbs ? this is a baseline week so pick a weight that lets you hit 10-12 at RPE 7. Adjust if needed and log what you actually used.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 185 ? last week you went 10/9/8 at RPE 7/9/8. Reps are dropping set to set and set 2 spiked to RPE 9 which is too high mid-session. Need 10/10/10 at RPE ? 8 to earn 195. Focus on your breathing reset between reps ? stand up, take a full breath, brace, then pull. Set 2 is where this is breaking down. Lats tight, bar close to your shins, drive through the floor.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 ? last week you hit 10/10/10 reps but sets 2 and 3 dropped to 50 lbs. The reps are there, the weight is not. This week all three sets need to be at 55 lbs. Pull to the hip, full second squeeze at the top, slow the negative ? do not rush the eccentric. Log each side separately.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? last week 10/10/8 at RPE 7/8/8. Sets 1 and 2 were clean, set 3 dropped 2 reps. Need 10/10/10 at RPE ? 8 to earn 110. Wide grip, pull to upper chest, squeeze lats at the bottom position. You are leaning back into a row on set 3 when you fatigue ? resist that. Stay upright and let the lats do the work.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 ? last week 12/15/15 at RPE 7/7/7. Sets 2 and 3 were perfect. Set 1 only hit 12. Need all 3 sets at 15 reps to earn 65. Rope at upper pulley, pull to your face, thumbs pointing behind you at the finish. Set 1 is the one to focus on ? don't coast through it.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN ? replacing EZ bar curl this week. EZ bar was sitting at 10/10/8 at RPE 9/8/8 ? too high cost early and rep drop late. Hammer curl hits the brachialis and brachioradialis with a neutral grip, which is easier on the elbow and lets you train the curl pattern with better control. Start at 30 lbs. Elbows pinned, neutral grip, full curl to shoulder height, slow the negative. Aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8. Log it so we have a baseline.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? last week you only logged 1 of 3 sets. That's two weeks in a row with incomplete data on this one. This week complete all 3 sets. Lie perpendicular across the bench, DB behind your head, slight bend in the elbows, lower slowly until you feel the stretch across your lats and chest, pull back over. Aim for 10-12 at RPE 7. Three sets. Log all of them.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? legs day was not logged again this week. Previous data had you at 9/8/8 at RPE 8/8/8 ? dropping reps on sets 2 and 3. Need 9-10 reps on all 3 sets at RPE ? 8 to earn 175. Below parallel, big breath before you unrack, brace hard, drive through the heels. This day keeps getting skipped ? log it.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 ? legs day was not logged this week. Previous session was a clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7. If you can replicate that here you earn 155 next week. Slight knee bend, hips back, bar close to your shins on the way down, feel the hamstring stretch at the bottom. Log it and earn the bump.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? legs day was not logged. Previously stuck at 10 reps when we need 12. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, front shin stays vertical, drive through the front heel. Intentionally push past 10 on every set this week. The reps are in there. Log each side.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 75 ? legs day was not logged. Previous data was 12/12/10 at RPE 7/7/8 ? first two sets clean, third set dropped. Need 12/12/12 at RPE ? 8 to earn 85. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension at the top, hard squeeze for one full second. Lock in that third set.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN ? replacing leg curl this week. Leg curl has been stuck at 65 lbs going 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/9 when we need 12-15 reps. Rotating in leg extensions to hit the quads directly as an isolation finisher and give the hamstrings a slightly different stimulus pattern next week. Start at 50 lbs ? baseline week. Squeeze hard at the top for one full second, slow controlled negative. Aim for 12-15 at RPE 7. Adjust weight if needed and log what you actually used.

exercises.name: Captain's Chair Knee Raise
exercises.notes: Staying with captain's chair knee raise ? this was rotated in last week to replace hanging leg raises after you went 8/6/5 at RPE 9/9/9. No log came in for legs day so we still don't have baseline data on this movement. Forearms on the dip bar pads, raise knees to chest height, no swinging, control the descent all the way down. Aim for 10-12 at RPE 7-8. Log all three sets so we have something to work with.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
